data.author: Bloomberg
data.title: OpenAI releases AI agent security tool for research preview
data.description: The agent, called Codex Security, works by identifying cybersecurity flaws and proposing solutions before fixing the bugs
data.content:
OpenAI is introducing an AI agent thats meant to help security teams find and patch vulnerabilities in large databases, potentially cutting into demand for legacy cyber firms.
